login.title: Identity Access
login.subtitle: Unlock your localized workspace portal
login.error_failed: Identification failed. Please check your credentials.
login.reset_confirm: DANGER: This will permanently delete ALL local data (inventory, invoices, customers) and reset your registration. Ensure you have a LOCAL BACKUP or CLOUD SYNC before proceeding. This action is irreversible. Are you sure?

register.structure_desc: Configure your basic identity and business registration.
register.identity_desc: Set your primary contact and location details.
register.security_desc: Establish your root credentials and preferences.
register.error_fill_required: Please fill in all required fields.
register.error_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.

sidebar.login_desc: Enter your credentials to unlock your local business engine.
sidebar.register_desc: Your enterprise-grade local ERP. Simple setup, secure, entirely offline.
sidebar.privacy_desc: Your data never leaves this machine.
sidebar.privacy_security_desc: Tokens stored locally only. No data transmitted externally.
sidebar.developed_by: Designed and developed with precision by the engineering team at Teebot Labs.

onboarding.welcome_desc: Teebot Flow is optimized for local performance. Choose how you'd like to set up your business workspace today.
onboarding.new_desc: Start a new business profile from scratch. Perfect for new shops and companies.
onboarding.backup_desc: Recover your workspace using a local .tbf backup file. This will restore all customers, inventory, and history.
onboarding.restore_success: System restored successfully. Please log in.
onboarding.restore_failed: Failed to restore database. Please check the file and try again.
onboarding.cloud_desc: Connect to Teebot Cloud to synchronize your multi-branch or remote data.
onboarding.cloud_desc_offline: No internet connection detected. Check your connection and try again.
onboarding.cloud_desc_server_down: Cloud service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
onboarding.cloud_desc_no_internet: No internet connection. Please check your network and try again.
onboarding.cloud_desc_server_unreachable: Internet connected, but cloud service is unreachable. Server may be down.
onboarding.cloud_security_no_internet: Internet connection lost. Please check your network.
onboarding.cloud_security_server_unavailable: Cloud service is no longer available. Please try again later.
onboarding.cloud_coming_soon: Cloud synchronization is under development and will be available in V. 1.0.0

cloud_sync.modal_desc: Recover your business profile and multi-branch data from the cloud.
cloud_sync.step_init_desc: Enter your primary identifiers to locate your cloud record.
cloud_sync.step_verify_desc: For your protection, please verify one of your business details.
cloud_sync.step_otp_desc: Enter the 6-digit verification code sent to your registered email.
cloud_sync.error_sync_failed: Cloud sync failed. Please verify your details.
cloud_sync.field_streetAddress: What is your registered Street Address?
cloud_sync.sync_success: Cloud synchronization complete! Local workspace initialized.

recovery.recovery_saved_desc: Your recovery key has been created. Please save it securely.
recovery.recovery_warning_desc: Teebot Flow uses end-to-end encryption. We do not store your recovery key. If you lose this code, your cloud backups cannot be decrypted.
recovery.email_sent: We've also emailed this key to {{email}} for your records.

cloud_sync_messages.check_inbox: Check your inbox! We've sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}.
cloud_sync_messages.restore_desc: Enter your 32-digit Recovery Key to decrypt and restore your cloud backup.
cloud_sync_messages.backup_found: We found a cloud backup for your business! To restore your data, please enter your 32-digit Recovery Key.
cloud_sync_messages.enter_recovery_key: Please enter your Recovery Key to restore data.
cloud_sync_messages.restore_failed: Failed to restore backup from cloud. You can still continue with a fresh setup.
cloud_sync_messages.resend_success: A new verification code has been sent to your email.

register_errors.phone_already_exists: This phone number is already in use!
register_errors.sync_failed: Cloud synchronization failed. Please check your internet or try local-only setup.
